title: Workflows and CI/CD Integration
description: Embed agents into your development lifecycle with automated workflows, code review, and CI pipelines

lessons.title: Agent Workflows
lessons.description: Defining repeatable multi-step workflows that agents execute deterministically

lessons.title: CI/CD Integration
lessons.description: Running agents in GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and other CI/CD pipelines

lessons.title: Automated Code Review
lessons.description: Setting up agent-powered code review that catches real bugs, not just lint

lessons.title: Test-Driven Agent Development
lessons.description: Using TDD workflows to guide agents toward correct implementations

lessons.title: Continuous Agent Improvement
lessons.description: Iterating on CLAUDE.md, hooks, and context based on agent session feedback
